health_governance_policy.name: Governance & Health Policy
health_governance_policy.description: Strategic leadership and regulation of the health sector. Includes the National Health Act, health financing, budget allocation for health, NHIS (National Health Insurance Scheme), Basic Health Care Provision Fund (BHCPF), and Ministry of Health policies.

disease_outbreaks_surveillance.name: Disease Outbreaks & Surveillance
disease_outbreaks_surveillance.description: Monitoring and response to epidemic-prone diseases. Covers Lassa Fever, Cholera, COVID-19, Meningitis, Monkeypox, Ebola, and NCDC (Nigeria Centre for Disease Control) surveillance activities.

endemic_infectious_diseases.name: Endemic & Infectious Diseases
endemic_infectious_diseases.description: Ongoing management of burden diseases. Includes Malaria, Tuberculosis (TB), HIV/AIDS, Neglected Tropical Diseases (NTDs), and treatment programs for these conditions.

antimicrobial_resistance.name: Antimicrobial Resistance & Hospital Infections
antimicrobial_resistance.description: Issues related to drug resistance and hospital safety. Covers antibiotic resistance, superbugs, rational use of medicines, and hospital-acquired infections.

hospitals_healthcare_facilities.name: Hospitals & Healthcare Facilities
hospitals_healthcare_facilities.description: Infrastructure and state of medical centers. Includes Teaching Hospitals, Federal Medical Centres (FMCs), General Hospitals, Primary Healthcare Centers (PHCs), hospital equipment, and facility conditions.

health_workforce.name: Health Workforce
health_workforce.description: Human resources for health. Includes Doctors, Nurses, Pharmacists, Lab Scientists, brain drain ('Japa'), shortage of staff, and recruitment of health workers.

workforce_strikes_protests.name: Workforce Strikes & Protests
workforce_strikes_protests.description: Industrial actions by health unions. Covers strikes by NMA (Nigerian Medical Association), NARD (National Association of Resident Doctors), JOHESU, and demands for salary arrears or hazard allowance.

drugs_pharmaceuticals.name: Drugs & Pharmaceuticals
drugs_pharmaceuticals.description: Regulation and supply of medicines. Includes NAFDAC activities, fake/substandard drugs, drug supply chains, pharmacy regulation, and cost of medication.

vaccines_immunization.name: Vaccines & Immunization
vaccines_immunization.description: Vaccination programs and coverage. Includes NPHCDA (National Primary Health Care Development Agency), routine immunization, polio eradication, measles vaccine, and vaccine storage/cold chain.

maternal_child_health.name: Maternal & Child Health
maternal_child_health.description: Health of mothers and children. Covers maternal mortality, infant mortality, antenatal care, delivery services, family planning, and reproductive health.

nutrition_food_security.name: Nutrition & Food Security
nutrition_food_security.description: Nutritional status of the population. Covers malnutrition, stunting in children, wasting, micronutrient deficiency, and severe acute malnutrition (SAM).

public_sentiment_complaints.name: Public Sentiment & Complaints
public_sentiment_complaints.description: General public feedback on health services. Includes negligence, poor attitude of staff, rejection of patients (especially gunshot victims), and patient satisfaction.

health_misinformation_rumors.name: Health Misinformation & Rumors
health_misinformation_rumors.description: Spread of false health information. Includes vaccine hesitancy, fake cures, herbal remedy myths, and conspiracy theories affecting public health.

health_emergencies_disasters.name: Health Emergencies & Disasters
health_emergencies_disasters.description: Mass casualty events and acute health crises. Includes building collapses, explosions, mass accidents requiring emergency response, and ambulance services.
